languages.text: "Все, как всегда: забочусь о династии. В данном случае — избавляясь от подозрительной особы, которая посмела проникнуть во дворец под чужим именем."

traits.locale_text: "Все, как всегда: забочусь о династии. В данном случае — избавляясь от подозрительной особы, которая посмела проникнуть во дворец под чужим именем."

languages.text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."
languages.original_text: "Все, как всегда: забочусь о династии. В данном случае — избавляясь от подозрительной особы, которая посмела проникнуть во дворец под чужим именем."

traits.locale_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."
"The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."
"The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

languages.text: “和往常一样，守护王朝。这一回嘛，就是要除掉一个胆敢用假身份潜入宫殿的可疑人物。”
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: “和往常一样，守护王朝。这一回嘛，就是要除掉一个胆敢用假身份潜入宫殿的可疑人物。”

languages.text: « Ce que je fais depuis toujours : je protège la dynastie. Dans ce cas précis, je me débarrasse d'une personne suspecte qui a osé s'introduire dans le palais sous un faux nom. »
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: « Ce que je fais depuis toujours : je protège la dynastie. Dans ce cas précis, je me débarrasse d'une personne suspecte qui a osé s'introduire dans le palais sous un faux nom. »

languages.text: "Her zamanki gibi hanedanlığın çıkarlarını gözetiyorum. Bu durumda ise bunu, saraya sahte bir isimle girmeye cüret eden şüpheli bir şahıstan kurtularak yapıyorum."
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: "Her zamanki gibi hanedanlığın çıkarlarını gözetiyorum. Bu durumda ise bunu, saraya sahte bir isimle girmeye cüret eden şüpheli bir şahıstan kurtularak yapıyorum."

languages.text: «Lo mismo de siempre: busco lo mejor para la dinastía. En este caso, eso significa librarme de{mf|l hombre| la mujer} sospechos{mf|o|a} que ha entrado en el palacio bajo un nombre falso».
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: «Lo mismo de siempre: busco lo mejor para la dinastía. En este caso, eso significa librarme de{mf|l hombre| la mujer} sospechos{mf|o|a} que ha entrado en el palacio bajo un nombre falso».

languages.text: "Dasselbe wie immer: Ich passe auf die Dynastie auf. In diesem Fall beseitige ich eine verdächtige Person, die es gewagt hat, den Palast unter falschem Namen zu betreten."
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: "Dasselbe wie immer: Ich passe auf die Dynastie auf. In diesem Fall beseitige ich eine verdächtige Person, die es gewagt hat, den Palast unter falschem Namen zu betreten."

languages.text: 「いつものように、王朝を守るために。この場合は、偽名で宮殿に侵入した疑わしい人物を排除することだ。」
languages.original_text: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."

traits.locale_text: 「いつものように、王朝を守るために。この場合は、偽名で宮殿に侵入した疑わしい人物を排除することだ。」
